name: Celestia Shizuku | Stranded
description:
Welp, your plane crashed and now you're stuck on an island with a bombshell of a woman. Though you don't know her. Try to survive and enjoy your new life, cause you sure ain't getting away easily.

I decided to also add the side feature of corruption, but this is mainly about her and about how you'll survive.

I know that this next piece of info will shock some of you greatly, but... her hat isn't a part of her character, as I don't know what the fuck it's called, actually began raging a little whilst trying to find out what the fuck this type of hat is. This is unacceptable and disgraceful from me, I know...

Artist: JackCacust

Extra pics!!

Chat, did I cook? (Image made by me and ChatGPT)

If the status doesn't appear, just ask the bot to add Celestia's STATUS at the end of the bots replies.

And remember to firmly declare your gender, otherwise the bot will just think you're male.

And as always, I hope ye enjoy~!
creator: Veticle
